TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_Nate_Blackwell, title = Nate_Blackwell, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/Nate_Blackwell} }

S.FORM: == Nate Blackwell == Nate Blackwell sraral hya'ga sisyuw na NBA, wal malaxmisuq qaniy la. kawas tay 1965, ryax sa tay 15 nqu tay 2, Nate Blackwell, squliq na p'unro. Nate Blackwell hya ga wal malax senmong pgnaw mari na Amirika. qnhan nya' sraral Kawas tay1987, galan tay 27 lpgan sisyuw na San Antonio Spurs qu Nate Blackwell. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players Nate Blackwell

== Nate Blackwell == Nate Blackwell sraral hya'ga sisyuw na NBA, wal malaxmisuq qaniy la. kawas tay 1965, ryax sa tay 15 nqu tay 2, Nate Blackwell, squliq na p'unro. Nate Blackwell hya ga wal malax senmong pgnaw mari na Amirika. qnhan nya' sraral Kawas tay1987, galan tay 27 lpgan sisyuw na San Antonio Spurs qu Nate Blackwell. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players Nate Blackwell
S.PHON: == nate Œ≤la ¶~ ®kwell == nate Œ≤la ¶~ ®kwell s~…ïraral ƒßja î…£a s~…ïis~…ïjuw na nŒ≤a, wal malaxmis~…ïuq qanij la. kawas~…ï taj ****, rjax s~…ïa taj ** nqu taj *, nate Œ≤la ¶~ ®kwell, s~…ïquliq na p îunro. nate Œ≤la ¶~ ®kwell ƒßja …£a wal malax s~…ïenmo≈ã p…£naw mari na amirika. qnƒßan nja î s~…ïraral kawas~…ï taj****, …£alan taj ** lp…£an s~…ïis~…ïjuw na s~…ïan antonio s~…ïpurs~…ï qu nate Œ≤la ¶~ ®kwell. ¶~ ®inkƒßulan s~…ïa knita î s~…ïa Œ≤rŒ≤iru î lis~…ïts~…ï o* national Œ≤as~…ïketŒ≤all as~…ïs~…ïo ¶~ ®iation plajers~…ï nate Œ≤la ¶~ ®kwell
